records.question: Which Firefox browsers are compatible with an accelerator?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT browser.id
FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.name LIKE '%Firefox%'

records.question: Which Opera browsers with a market share of 1.2 are compatible since 2009 or later with the fasTun accelerator that has All as the client, Any connection, and an operating system containing Any?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.operating_system LIKE '%Any%' AND web_client_accelerator.connection = 'Any' AND browser.name = 'Opera' AND browser.market_share = 1.2 AND web_client_accelerator.name = 'fasTun' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year >= 2009 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'All'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id
FROM browser b
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser acb ON b.id = acb.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator w ON acb.accelerator_id = w.id
WHERE b.name = 'Opera'
AND b.market_share = 1.2
AND acb.compatible_since_year >= 2009
AND w.name = 'fasTun'
AND w.Client = 'All'
AND w.Connection = 'Any'
AND w.Operating_system LIKE '%Any%'

records.question: Which browsers have a market share of at least 28.96 and have been compatible since 2010 with accelerators where the client is End User, ISP?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.market_share >= 28.96 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'End User, ISP' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id
FROM browser b
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser acb ON b.id = acb.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator wca ON acb.accelerator_id = wca.id
WHERE b.market_share >= 28.96
AND acb.compatible_since_year = 2010
AND wca.Client = 'End User, ISP'

records.question: Which browsers with a market share of at least 1.2 are compatible with accelerators where the client is user?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.client = 'user' AND browser.market_share >= 1.2
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id
FROM browser b
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser acb ON b.id = acb.browser_id
JOIN Web_client_accelerator wca ON acb.accelerator_id = wca.id
WHERE b.market_share >= 1.2 AND wca.Client = 'User'
